/usr/bin/ar qc libfpA_intB_gemm.a CMakeFiles/fpA_intB_gemm.dir/cpp/tensorrt_llm/kernels/cutlass_kernels/cutlass_heuristic.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fpA_intB_gemm.dir/cpp/tensorrt_llm/kernels/cutlass_kernels/cutlass_preprocessors.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fpA_intB_gemm.dir/cpp/tensorrt_llm/kernels/cutlass_kernels/fpA_intB_gemm/fp16_int4_gemm_fg_scalebias.cu.o CMakeFiles/fpA_intB_gemm.dir/cpp/tensorrt_llm/kernels/cutlass_kernels/fpA_intB_gemm/launchers/fpA_intB_gemm_sm80_wrappers.cu.o CMakeFiles/fpA_intB_gemm.dir/cpp/tensorrt_llm/kernels/weightOnlyBatchedGemv/kernelDispatcherFp16Int4GroupwiseColumnMajorInterleavedTrue.cu.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libfpA_intB_gemm.a
